--- title: "1992-07 Dashboard" subtitle: "Monthly Dashboard for Fabric Softener sold at Dominick's: July 1992" draft: true format: html: toc: true toc-expand: 2 categories: - Dominicks - Fabric Softener - 1992-07 - GEKS --- # Overview ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} library(dplyr) ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stderr} ``` Attaching package: 'dplyr' ``` ::: ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stderr} ``` The following objects are masked from 'package:stats': filter, lag ``` ::: ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stderr} ``` The following objects are masked from 'package:base': intersect, setdiff, setequal, union ``` ::: ```{.r .cell-code} library(DT) ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stderr} ``` Warning: package 'DT' was built under R version 4.5.2 ``` ::: ```{.r .cell-code} library(arrow) ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stderr} ``` Warning: package 'arrow' was built under R version 4.5.2 ``` ::: ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stderr} ``` Attaching package: 'arrow' ``` ::: ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stderr} ``` The following object is masked from 'package:utils': timestamp ``` ::: ```{.r .cell-code} period <- "1992-07" ccdi_df <- read_parquet("../../../output/fsf_ccdi.parquet") ccdi_df <- ccdi_df %>% arrange(period) %>% # Ensure data is ordered chronologically first mutate( mom_ratio = score / lag(score, n = 1), yoy_ratio = score / lag(score, n = 12) ) # Extract the MoM ratio for the specific period mom_value <- ccdi_df %>% filter(period == .env$period) %>% pull(mom_ratio) # Extract the YoY ratio for the specific period yoy_value <- ccdi_df %>% filter(period == .env$period) %>% pull(yoy_ratio) # Create a small dataframe for the bar chart bar_df <- data.frame( Metric = factor(c("YoY", "MoM"), levels = c("YoY", "MoM")), # YoY at bottom, MoM on top Value = c(yoy_value, mom_value) ) datatable(bar_df, options = list( dom = 't' # i.e. Table only )) ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ```{=html}
``` ::: ::: # Diagnostics ## Analytical (output) diagnostics ## Input diagnostics ## Monitoring / data validation
